title: Amtech 52-LED Rechargeable Work Light and Torch
features: 48 LED work light and 4 LED torch, Individual switch for torch and work light
Water and oil resistant, Complete with hanging hook and magnet
Approx 2 hours recharging time provides 3 - 4 hours of continuous use
Supplied with AC/DC adaptor and 12v car plug
Ideal for mechanics, workshop, camping and leisure applications
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Box Contains Product and batteries
